Package registry.render

Class RendererRegistry

java.lang.Object
registry.render.RendererRegistry
public final class RendererRegistry extends Object
A registry that maps component classes to their corresponding Renderers. This allows the rendering system to dynamically look up the appropriate renderer for any game object.

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • register

      public <T> void register(Class<T> type, Renderer<? super T> renderer)
      Registers a renderer for a specific type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the object to render.
      Parameters:
      type - The class of the object.
      renderer - The renderer instance to use for this type.

    • getRenderer

      public <T> Renderer<T> getRenderer(T obj)
      Retrieves the most specific renderer available for a given object instance.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the object.
      Parameters:
      obj - The object instance to find a renderer for.
      Returns:
      The best matching Renderer, or EmptyTileRenderer if no match is found.
